def positive_metric_emission_occurs_per_item_inside_inner_loop():
    rule_id = "metric_emission_occurs_per_item_inside_inner_loop"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag inner loops that emit one metric per item instead of aggregating."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
